allow: PowerShell($tools = @{}; foreach \($name in @\('magick','inkscape','rsvg-convert','node','npx'\)\) { $cmd = Get-Command $name -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { $tools[$name] = $cmd.Source } else { $tools[$name] = 'X' } }; $tools | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($chromePaths = @\('C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe', 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe', 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe'\); foreach \($p in $chromePaths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } })
